Date : 14 July 2026
The USA and China are not only top global economies; they have occupied topmost positions in innovation and application of Artificial Intelligence (AI).
China & the US, global leaders in AI are organizing consecutive AI conferences in the month of July and August 2026.
From 17–20 July 2026, China starts with the title “World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC) 2026” at China’s AI capital Shanghai.
China indicates to turn this tech summit as AI Diplomacy:
• Form initiation of the conference in 2018, for the first time Chinese President Xi Jinping will open the “World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC) 2026” with his keynote speech.
• There will be more than 300 global product debuts in the WAIC 2026.
• Delegations from more than 10 international organizations will attend the conference.
Theme of WAIC 2026 is, “Intelligent Partners, Co-create the Future”.
Next month August 4–6, 2026, Las Vegas will host Ai4, largest AI conference of the USA.
According to https://ai4.io/agenda-overview/
,
“Explore the power of AI Agents — autonomous systems capable of completing complex tasks and reasoning independently.
1000+ speakers will share their intellect, including Geoffrey Hinton
(God father of AI) and Fei-Fei Li ( God Mother of AI).”
The US leads AI race with Large Language Models (LLMs), AI research, AI Chip design and funding in AI sector.
At the same time, Chinese AI experts making name with AI patent filings, large scale data, government support and immediate implementation.
AI conferences in China and the US can be inspiration for other countries to concentrate on leveraging AI benefits while enabling AI capacities in all regions is imperative.
